atlanta.neighborhoods: Midtown, Downtown, Buckhead, Inman Park, Virginia-Highland, East Atlanta
atlanta.meetingHighlights: Extensive AA community across neighborhoods with many specialty meetings (Spanish-language, LGBTQ+, young people) and frequent large speaker events.
atlanta.transitInfo: MARTA rail and bus network serve the city; Hartsfield–Jackson Atlanta International Airport (ATL) is a major international hub.

augusta.neighborhoods: Downtown, Olde Town, Summerville, North Augusta (nearby), West Augusta, Turpin Hill
augusta.meetingHighlights: Active downtown and Summerville meetings with an engaged fellowship and regular speaker nights and workshops.
augusta.transitInfo: Augusta Public Transit provides local service; Augusta Regional Airport (AGS) offers regional connections.

columbus.meetingHighlights: Community-centered meetings with strong military and university outreach (near Fort Benning), regular evening and weekend options.
columbus.transitInfo: METRA Transit buses cover the metro; Columbus Metropolitan Airport provides regional flights.

macon.neighborhoods: Downtown, Vineville, Shirley Hills, Ingleside, North Macon, Lizella
macon.meetingHighlights: Historic meetings with strong Big Book study groups; active fellowship around Mercer University and downtown area.
macon.transitInfo: Macon Transit Authority provides bus service; Middle Georgia Regional Airport (MCN) offers regional flights.

savannah.neighborhoods: Historic District, Victorian District, Starland, Midtown
savannah.meetingHighlights: Historic downtown meetings with a strong seasonal influx of visitors; active community and church-based groups in Starland and Midtown.
savannah.transitInfo: Chatham Area Transit provides bus services; Savannah/Hilton Head International Airport (SAV) for regional travel.

athens.areaDescription: Athens area, home to University of Georgia
athens.neighborhoods: Downtown, Five Points, Normaltown, Cobbham, Boulevard, Eastside
athens.meetingHighlights: College-town meetings with young people's groups and active campus outreach at UGA; vibrant music scene recovery community.
athens.transitInfo: Athens Transit provides bus routes throughout the city and UGA campus; Groome Transportation connects to Atlanta airport.

marietta.areaDescription: Marietta and Cobb County in northwest metro Atlanta
marietta.neighborhoods: Marietta Square, East Cobb, West Cobb, Kennesaw, Acworth, Powder Springs
marietta.meetingHighlights: Active suburban recovery community with meetings around the Marietta Square and throughout Cobb County; strong evening and weekend groups; Kennesaw State University area meetings attract younger members.
marietta.transitInfo: CobbLinc bus service connects Marietta to Atlanta MARTA; close to I-75 and I-575; Hartsfield-Jackson Atlanta International Airport (ATL) accessible via highway.

valdosta.areaDescription: Valdosta and Lowndes County in south Georgia near the Florida border
valdosta.neighborhoods: Downtown Valdosta, North Valdosta, Remerton, Moody AFB area, Valdosta State University area
valdosta.meetingHighlights: South Georgia recovery hub with meetings near Valdosta State University and Moody Air Force Base; welcoming community with evening discussion and Big Book study groups.
valdosta.transitInfo: Valdosta-Lowndes County Transit provides local bus service; Valdosta Regional Airport (VLD); I-75 corridor near the Georgia-Florida state line.

roswell.areaDescription: North Fulton suburb in the Atlanta metropolitan area
roswell.neighborhoods: Historic Roswell, East Roswell, Roswell Mill area, Holcomb Bridge corridor, Crabapple vicinity, Horseshoe Bend
roswell.meetingHighlights: North metro meetings serve Roswell and nearby suburbs with strong weeknight participation.
roswell.transitInfo: Travel is mostly by car via GA-400 and Holcomb Bridge Road; MARTA access is available from nearby north Fulton stations.

sandy-springs.areaDescription: Major north-side city in the Atlanta metropolitan area
sandy-springs.neighborhoods: City Springs, Perimeter Center, Riverside, North Springs, Dunwoody Panhandle, Sandy Springs Circle area
sandy-springs.meetingHighlights: Meetings draw a large north Atlanta population with convenient after-work and weekend options.
sandy-springs.transitInfo: MARTA Red Line stations at Sandy Springs, North Springs, and Medical Center support transit access; GA-400 and I-285 intersect nearby.

albany.areaDescription: Regional center in southwest Georgia on the Flint River
albany.neighborhoods: Downtown, Rawson Circle, Doublegate, Northwest Albany, Radium Springs area, Merry Acres
albany.meetingHighlights: Meetings serve southwest Georgia communities with reliable local options throughout the week.
albany.transitInfo: Albany Transit System provides local service; US-19, US-82, and Southwest Georgia Regional Airport support travel.
